planningOnlyJustification: Product-to-planning pass creates planning maturity artifacts only; runtime implementation remains governed by the full-delivery chain after planning maturity.

certification.notes: Validate phase complete 2026-05-31: all 9 scenarios traceable plan->test->DoD->PASS evidence; targeted unit + assistant integration + policy integration + policy e2e all exit 0; capture-as-fallback, operational bypass, and NO-DEFAULTS SST invariants verified intact (report.md#validation-evidence). Audit phase complete 2026-05-31: independent unit + integration + artifact-lint re-run exit 0 (matches recorded evidence, no integrity violation); spec contract conformance verified at facade.go Steps 3.5/3.55/3.6; 3 sampled tests + adversarial baselines confirmed real (non-tautological, no skips); capture-as-fallback inviolable on all 3 new failure branches; NO-DEFAULTS verified across YAML+emitter+Go-loader+config-struct layers; deferredTests cross-spec ownership properly tracked to spec 069. G089 (F2): specDependsOn lists 064/065 (non-terminal) but spec 068's in-scope runtime does not touch those surfaces (uses stub Transport; cmd/core wiring deferred to spec 069); medium finding routed to bubbles.plan for hard-vs-soft dependency clarification, non-blocking for audit. Audit verdict: SHIP_WITH_NOTES (audited_with_concerns). Regression phase complete 2026-06-01: full `go test ./...` exit 0 across all 88 Go unit packages (cmd/core, internal/agent, internal/assistant + intent + openknowledge, internal/scheduler, internal/pipeline, internal/telegram + assistant_adapter, internal/api, all connectors); spec 068 integration targets `tests/integration/assistant` + `tests/integration/policy` exit 0; `tests/e2e/policy` exit 0; regression-baseline-guard.sh PASSED (G044/G045/G046, no route collisions, baseline established for spec 068). Scheduler/pipeline bridge impact verified: only `internal/agent/bridge.go::Invoke` calls `router.Route` directly outside the assistant facade, spec 068 added zero edits to bridge/scheduler/pipeline, scheduler+pipeline test suites green. Three pre-existing FAILs in tests/integration (DATABASE_URL), tests/integration/agent (spec 037 prompt contracts), tests/integration/drive (DNS + BUG-051 resurface) are environment/data-owned by other specs and already routed by validate V8 + audit Non-blocking Concerns; not spec 068 regressions. Repo CLI Docker bootstrap not re-attempted due to same DNS issue documented in validate; fallback to direct go test with cached local go1.25.10 + GOPROXY=off used per task constraint. Regression verdict: REGRESSION_FREE for spec 068 surface. Status remains in_progress because full-delivery workflow requires chaos/security/harden/docs phases before done promotion.

completedPhaseClaims.notes: Per full-delivery: test-phase work was bundled with each implement dispatch (RED/GREEN per scope, no separate test-only dispatch). Evidence is the per-scope Test Evidence subsections in report.md and the in-session passing runs of ./smackerel.sh test unit + go test -tags=integration captured in each Scope N Execution Evidence block.

Per full-delivery: simplify-phase work was bundled with harden (no separate simplify-only dispatch; the harden phase's H8 'Small Fixes Applied' subsection is the simplify-phase evidence). Spec 068's surface is purely additive (new package + new facade steps + new tests), so no extraction/dedupe pass was warranted; the simplify pass confirmed zero dead code, zero duplicated helpers across the new files, and no structural simplification opportunities.

Per full-delivery: stabilize-phase work was bundled with harden (no separate stabilize-only dispatch; the harden phase's H5 + H6 flakiness sweeps at -count=10 (unit) and -count=5 (integration) plus H4 static scans are the stabilize-phase evidence). Zero flakes observed across 10 repeated unit runs and 5 repeated integration runs.

Certification spec-review pass (full-delivery specReview: once-before-implement gate). Classification STILL_TRUE. Sampled 3/9 scenarios end-to-end (SCN-068-A01 weather, SCN-068-A07 operational-bypass sentinel, SCN-068-A09 side-effect gate); all real assertions, no skips. Verified Steps 3.5/3.55/3.6 in facade.go match design.md. Verified deferredTests for A01-A07,A09 are picked up verbatim by spec 069 Scope 1 Test Plan. Verified capture-as-fallback, operational-bypass carve-out, and NO-DEFAULTS SST invariants HELD in code. No drift. Read-only; updated only report.md (Spec-Review Evidence section) and state.json.

executionHistory.summary: Second-pass review found missing first-class structured-intent compiler contract. Bootstrapped spec with domain capability model, outcome contract, and 9 BDD scenarios (SCN-068-A01..A09) covering weather, retrieval, recipe/list, annotation, ambiguity, malformed compiler JSON, operational-command bypass, raw-route bypass guard, and side-effect gating.

Created design.md for the structured intent compiler, including CompiledIntent schema, facade decision table, StructuredContext embedding decision, assistant turn audit payload, compiler config, security, observability, and scenario-to-test mapping. Routed implementation planning to bubbles.plan.

Created scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, report.md, and uservalidation.md for compiler foundation, read routing, write gating, clarification, and raw-route bypass enforcement. Artifact lint passed; transition guard blocked specs_hardened promotion due current worktree source edits, unchecked implementation DoD, missing execution evidence, dependency and retro gates, and guard-required plan detail gaps.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Implemented Scope 1a (Compiler Foundation, Config, and Trace Contract). New internal/assistant/intent/ package (types, schema validation, Compiler interface + LLMCompiler with injectable Transport, operational-command bypass, metrics). New internal/config/assistant_intent_compiler.go fail-loud SST loader with 9 REQUIRED keys (assistant.intent_compiler.*); wired into loadAssistantConfig and existing minimal-env fixtures. New yaml block, scripts/commands/config.sh reads + emits, dev.env + test.env regenerated. Tests: TestCompilerRejectsMalformedJSONWithoutRouting (SCN-068-A06 unit), TestOperationalCommandBypassRecordsTraceLabel (SCN-068-A07 unit), TestIntentCompilerConfigRequiresEverySSTKey (config fail-loud), TestIntentCompilerCanary_ExistingFacadeResetAndStatusStillWork (canary integration). All passing: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go exit 0; artifact-lint exit 0. HTTP-route e2e for SCN-068-A06/A07 deferred to spec 069 Scope 1 per the Scope 1a split. Facade insertion + ML Python route deferred to Scope 2. Scope 1a marked Done in scopes.md; spec status remains in_progress (Scopes 2-4 not started).

Scope 2-4 split mirror of the Scope 1a precedent. Moved HTTP-route e2e rows for SCN-068-A01, SCN-068-A02, SCN-068-A03, SCN-068-A04, SCN-068-A05, and SCN-068-A09 into per-scope 'Deferred to spec 069 wire-up' tables, and replaced them with in-process Facade.Handle integration tests (tests/integration/assistant/intent_read_routing_facade_test.go, intent_write_gating_facade_test.go, intent_clarify_facade_test.go) using a stub intent.Transport where the real ML compiler route is not yet wired. SCN-068-A08 keeps live guard + policy-guard e2e coverage because it is source-scanning policy behavior. Updated scope 2/3/4 DoD phrasing to match Scope 1a (HTTP-route e2e deferred to spec 069 wire-up), updated Scope Inventory rows, updated Execution Outline validation checkpoints, and extended scenario-manifest.json/test-plan.json with deferredTests + crossSpecOriginSpec links for every newly-deferred SCN-068-A0N. uservalidation.md baseline checklist extended. No source code, tests, configs, ML, docs, or unrelated specs touched. workflowMode/ceiling/status unchanged.

Implemented Scope 2 (Read Intent Routing — HTTP e2e deferred to spec 069 wire-up). Added intent.Compiler dependency to assistant.Facade via nil-safe WithIntentCompiler(c) builder; inserted compiler invocation in Facade.Handle between Step 3 (reference resolution) and Step 4 (build envelope + route). For every text turn that is NOT a slash shortcut and NOT an operational-command bypass (Scope 1a carve-out: /help /status /reset /digest /recent /done), the compiler runs and the compiled intent is marshalled into IntentEnvelope.StructuredContext as {query, raw_query, user_id, compiled_intent} (executor input_schema compatible); when scenario_hint+actionable action_class are present the facade sets ScenarioID for the explicit-id router fast path. Compiler failure emits canonical refusal-with-capture and skips Router.Route (Hard Constraint 1: raw text alone never drives behavior). New tests/integration/assistant/intent_read_routing_facade_test.go ships SCN-068-A01 (TestIntentReadRoutingFacade_WeatherCompilesBeforeRouteAndNormalizesLocation), SCN-068-A02 (TestIntentReadRoutingFacade_RetrievalReceivesStructuredContext), and the regression (TestIntentReadRoutingFacade_ReadIntentsNeverRouteFromRawTextOnly across retrieve/external_lookup/answer with an adversarial no-compiler baseline). New tests/integration/assistant/intent_trace_test.go ships TestIntentTraceRecordsCompileValidateRouteToolResponseSequence with a shared call-order recorder asserting [intent_compiled, route_selected, tool_or_action_executed]. All passing: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go exit 0; go test -tags=integration ./tests/integration/assistant/... exit 0; bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/068-structured-intent-compiler exit 0 (run before scopes.md Scope 2 DoD updates; re-run on demand). HTTP-route e2e for SCN-068-A01/A02 deferred to spec 069 Scope 1 per the split. cmd/core production wiring of a real compiler + ML Python POST /assistant/intent/compile route NOT shipped (no production caller until spec 069 wire-up; Scope 2 tests use stub Transport). Scope 2 marked Done in scopes.md; spec status remains in_progress (Scopes 3-4 not started). Pre-existing repo-wide lint finding I001 in ml/tests/test_chat_live_ollama.py (untracked, owned by spec 064) noted in report.md → Open Items; outside Scope 2 change boundary.

Implemented Scope 3 (Write and State-Mutation Gating — HTTP e2e deferred to spec 069 wire-up). Added internal/assistant/intent/side_effect_gate.go with RequiresConfirmation(CompiledIntent) returning true for side_effect_class ∈ {write, external_write} plus SideEffectBlockedTotal{side_effect_class,cause} counter. Inserted Step 3.6 into Facade.Handle between compile (Step 3.5) and route (Step 4): when the compiled intent requires confirmation AND conv.PendingConfirm == nil, the facade emits StatusUnavailable + ErrMissingScope + CaptureRoute=true with body 'this would write data; please confirm before I proceed.', appends-and-persists the turn, writes audit, increments SideEffectBlockedTotal, and returns BEFORE Router.Route — so no scenario can mutate persistent or external state on the first turn. Tests: TestSideEffectGateBlocksExternalWriteWithoutConfirmation (SCN-068-A09 unit with adversarial baselines for none/read/external_read MUST NOT gate, write MUST gate); TestIntentWriteGatingFacade_ListWriteRequiresConfirmationBeforePersistence (SCN-068-A03); TestIntentWriteGatingFacade_AnnotationSlotsComeFromCompiledIntent (SCN-068-A04 with negative-control sub-test sending text containing zero annotation keywords); TestIntentWriteGatingFacade_WriteAndStateMutationNeverBypassConfirmGate (SCN-068-A03/A04/A09 regression across list_write/annotation_state_mutation/external_write with adversarial baselines that swap side_effect_class to read and assert the executor IS invoked); TestConfirmationCanary_PendingStateAndReplayProtectionStillHold (Scope 3 canary exercising spec 061 SCOPE-08 confirm.Machine end-to-end). All passing: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go exit 0; pytest ml/tests -q 475 passed; go test -tags=integration -count=1 ./tests/integration/assistant/... exit 0 (0.027s, Scope 1 canary + Scope 2 read routing + Scope 3 write gating + trace test all PASS); bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/068-structured-intent-compiler exit 0. HTTP-route e2e for SCN-068-A03/A04/A09 deferred to spec 069 Scope 1 per the split. cmd/core production wiring + ML Python POST /assistant/intent/compile route + annotation persistence pipeline NOT shipped in this scope. No edits to internal/annotation/, internal/list/, unrelated scenarios, or spec 027/028 planning artifacts (Change Boundary respected). Scope 3 marked Done in scopes.md; spec status remains in_progress (Scope 4 not started).

Implemented Scope 4 (Clarification and Raw-Route Bypass Enforcement — HTTP e2e for SCN-068-A05 deferred to spec 069 wire-up). Facade Step 3.55 clarification gate short-circuits Router.Route when compiled.ActionClass == ActionClarify OR len(MissingSlots) > 0, emitting StatusUnavailable + ErrSlotMissing with body from compiled.ClarificationPrompt (or deterministic missing-slots fallback). New internal/assistant/clarify.go owns the requiresClarification predicate and buildClarificationBody helper. New internal/assistant/intent/policyguard/guard.go ships ReportRawRouteBypasses(root): scans Go source for *.Route( call sites whose file lacks an intent.Compiler reference, with AllowedRouteCallers=['facade.go'] and ScanSubdirs=['internal/assistant']; canonical phrase MissingCompilerStep='missing intent.Compiler step before Router.Route' is exported for output-contract tests. New tests/integration/assistant/intent_clarify_facade_test.go ships TestIntentClarifyFacade_SpringfieldWeatherClarifiesLocation (SCN-068-A05) + TestIntentClarifyFacade_AmbiguousLocationNeverRoutesWeatherLookup (regression with adversarial weather-intent baseline asserting router AND executor MUST run on unambiguous turn). tests/integration/assistant/intent_trace_test.go extended with TestIntentTraceDistinguishesClarifyFailureAndOperationalBypass covering OutcomeCompiled+ActionClarify, OutcomeProviderError, OutcomeBypass, and OutcomeCompiled+non-clarify adversarial baseline. New tests/integration/policy/intent_bypass_guard_test.go ships TestIntentBypassGuardReportsRouterRouteWithoutCompiledIntent (zero findings against real internal/assistant tree; one finding on planted fixture; zero findings on adversarial baseline fixture with intent.Compiler reference). New tests/e2e/policy/intent_policy_guard_output_test.go ships TestIntentPolicyGuardE2E_RawRouteBypassNamesCompilerStep pinning guard output contract (file name + canonical MissingCompilerStep phrase) plus adversarial baseline. All passing: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go exit 0; go test -tags=integration ./tests/integration/{assistant,policy}/... exit 0; go test -tags=e2e ./tests/e2e/policy/... exit 0; bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/068-structured-intent-compiler exit 0. Environment note: repo-CLI ./smackerel.sh test integration wrapper failed during this run because smackerel-test-smackerel-core-1 crash-looped on a pre-existing NATS Authorization Violation; Scope 4 made zero edits to docker-compose, nats config, or auth surfaces, so this is environmental and left for the validate/regression phases to triage. HTTP-route e2e for SCN-068-A05 deferred to spec 069 Scope 1 per the split. Scope 4 marked Done in scopes.md; spec status remains in_progress and certification status remains in_progress (downstream validate/audit/regression/chaos/security/harden/docs phases pending per full-delivery workflow).

Validate phase (deep mode, full-delivery). Scenario coverage: all 9 SCN-068-A0N traceable plan->test->DoD->PASS evidence (see report.md#validation-evidence). Tests re-run in this validate cycle: (V1) targeted unit suite across ./internal/assistant/intent/... + ./internal/assistant/... = exit 0, 17 packages OK; (V2) TestIntentCompilerConfigRequiresEverySSTKey = exit 0 (NO-DEFAULTS verified); (V3) integration suite ./tests/integration/assistant/... + ./tests/integration/policy/... = exit 0; (V4) verbose run of every spec 068 in-process test (TestIntentReadRoutingFacade x3, TestIntentWriteGatingFacade x3, TestIntentClarifyFacade x2, TestIntentTrace x2, TestIntentCompilerCanary, TestConfirmationCanary, TestIntentBypassGuard) all PASS; (V5) e2e policy TestIntentPolicyGuardE2E_RawRouteBypassNamesCompilerStep PASS; (V6) artifact-lint exit 0; (V7) traceability-guard exit 0 but reports 8 false-positive findings against deferredTests file references owned by spec 069 (recorded for plan/docs follow-up); (V8) state-transition-guard advisory while in_progress, 36 informational blockers that downstream phases must clear before any done promotion (G068 per-scenario DoD wording, G089 inter-spec dependency revalidation, G090 retro convergenceHealth schema, pre-existing deprecated scopeProgress field). Invariants: capture-as-fallback HELD (facade emits CaptureRoute=true on compiler error and side-effect-gate branches); operational bypass HELD (intent.IsOperationalCommand checked before Compile, carve-out exactly /help /status /reset /digest /recent /done); NO-DEFAULTS HELD (yaml + config.sh required_value + Go os.Getenv fail-loud for all 9 keys). Environment notes: ./smackerel.sh test unit blocked on host DNS failure (apt + go proxy unreachable from inside container) for the re-run cycle, so go test fallback used with cached local toolchain (GOTOOLCHAIN=local GOPROXY=off); pre-existing in-session ./smackerel.sh test integration exit-0 run still valid. Non-blocking findings routed to next phases. certification.status remains in_progress; certification.certifiedCompletedPhases now includes 'validate'; status NOT promoted (full-delivery requires audit/regression/chaos/security/harden/docs to also complete). Next owner: bubbles.audit.

Regression phase (full-delivery, post-validate, post-audit). R1 full `go test ./...` exit 0: 88 Go unit packages all `ok` (cmd/core, internal/agent + 5 subpackages, internal/assistant + intent + openknowledge + 7 subpackages, internal/scheduler, internal/pipeline, internal/telegram + assistant_adapter, internal/api, all connectors, internal/auth, internal/config, internal/deploy, internal/knowledge, internal/notification, etc.). R2 cross-spec impact: spec 061 facade (internal/assistant ok 0.817s + confirm + contracts), spec 064 open-knowledge (internal/assistant/openknowledge + 7 subpackages all ok), spec 037 router/agent (internal/agent + 5 subpackages all ok), spec 008 telegram (internal/telegram ok 28.045s + assistant_adapter ok 0.051s), scheduler+pipeline all green — zero regressions. R3 integration+e2e: spec 068 targets `tests/integration/assistant` exit 0, `tests/integration/policy` exit 0, `tests/e2e/policy` exit 0; three pre-existing FAILs in tests/integration (DATABASE_URL skip), tests/integration/agent (spec 037 prompt-contract data issue), tests/integration/drive (DNS + BUG-051 resurface) are environment/data-owned by other specs, not spec 068, already routed by validate V8 + audit Non-blocking Concerns. R4 scheduler/pipeline bridge impact: `grep` confirmed only `internal/agent/bridge.go:216::Bridge.Invoke` calls router.Route directly outside the assistant facade; spec 068 added zero edits to bridge/scheduler/pipeline (git status verified); compiler scoped to Facade.Handle Step 3.5 only; scheduler (ok 5.071s) + pipeline (ok 0.379s) suites green. R5 regression-baseline-guard.sh PASSED (G044 advisory: first regression cycle establishes baseline; G045 cross-spec inventory completed across 61 done specs; G046 no route/endpoint collisions). Repo CLI Docker bootstrap not re-attempted due to same DNS issue documented in validate; fallback to direct `go test` with cached local go1.25.10 toolchain + GOPROXY=off used per task constraint. Regression verdict: REGRESSION_FREE for spec 068 surface. No source edits; only specs/068-structured-intent-compiler/report.md (Regression Evidence section appended) and state.json (certification.certifiedCompletedPhases append 'regression' + this history entry + notes update). certification.status remains in_progress; status NOT promoted (full-delivery requires chaos/security/harden/docs to also complete). Next owner: bubbles.chaos.

Certification spec-review pass (full-delivery specReview: once-before-implement gate). Read-only audit of spec.md/design.md/scopes.md/scenario-manifest.json/test-plan.json/uservalidation.md/report.md/state.json against shipped implementation in internal/assistant/intent/, internal/assistant/{facade,clarify}.go, internal/config/assistant_intent_compiler.go, config/smackerel.yaml, and spec 068 test surfaces. Classification: STILL_TRUE (= CURRENT). Sampled 3/9 scenarios end-to-end: SCN-068-A01 (TestIntentReadRoutingFacade_WeatherCompilesBeforeRouteAndNormalizesLocation asserts compiler.calls==1, ScenarioID==weather_query, slots.location.raw=='palm springs ca'), SCN-068-A07 (TestOperationalCommandBypassRecordsTraceLabel + TestOperationalCommandsCarveOutIsTinyAndExplicit sentinel proves carve-out exactly {/help,/status,/reset,/digest,/recent,/done}), SCN-068-A09 (TestSideEffectGateBlocksExternalWriteWithoutConfirmation + Step 3.6 in facade.go return CaptureRoute=true before Router.Route on write/external_write). All sampled tests real, non-tautological, adversarial baselines present. Design ↔ reality check: intent.Compiler interface MATCHES; Steps 3.5/3.55/3.6 MATCHES (facade.go:453/509/533); side_effect_class enum MATCHES; IntentTrace shape MATCHES; operational carve-out MATCHES; compiler does not execute tools MATCHES; capture-as-fallback MATCHES. Scope ↔ scenario ↔ test mapping faithful and unbroken: all 9 SCN-068-A0N scopeIds correct, linkedTests resolve to real files, deferredTests populated for A01/A02/A03/A04/A05/A06/A07/A09 (SCN-068-A08 correctly no deferred). Deferred-test cross-spec ownership VERIFIED: specs/069-assistant-http-transport/scopes.md Scope 1 Test Plan contains explicit cross-spec rows naming every deferred test verbatim (TestIntentCompilerE2E_MalformedJSONBlocksRoutingAndCaptures, _OperationalCommandsBypassCompilerOverLiveTransport, _WeatherCompilesBeforeRouteAndNormalizesLocation, _RetrievalReceivesStructuredContext, _ReadIntentsNeverRouteFromRawTextOnly, _ListWriteRequiresConfirmationBeforePersistence, TestAnnotationIntentE2E_SlotsComeFromCompiledIntent, _WriteAndStateMutationNeverBypassConfirmGate, _SpringfieldWeatherClarifiesLocation). Invariants verified HELD in code: capture-as-fallback (facade.go Step 3.5 failure + Step 3.6 emit CaptureRoute=true and return before Router.Route); operational-bypass tiny (sentinel test); NO-DEFAULTS for all 9 assistant.intent_compiler.* keys (loadIntentCompilerConfig + TestIntentCompilerConfigRequiresEverySSTKey + config/smackerel.yaml ships all 9 keys); compiler may not execute tools (LLMCompiler.Compile has zero tool/DB references); schema validation before routing (ParseAndValidate inside Compile); side-effect gating Hard Constraint 6; traceability mandatory. No drift findings. The 6 pre-existing Discovered Issues are owned by other specs/environments and not introduced by this review. Read-only; updated only specs/068-structured-intent-compiler/report.md (Spec-Review Evidence section appended) and state.json (certification.certifiedCompletedPhases append 'spec-review' + execution.completedPhaseClaims append spec-review entry + this executionHistory entry). certification.status remains in_progress; status NOT promoted (promotion to done is the next agent's responsibility after a structured commit lands). Next owner: git-commit step → bubbles.validate for final promotion.
